results.title: Tesla (TSLA) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
Tesla (TSLA) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026 $TSLA
Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts - Yahoo Finance
Tesla (TSLA) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
Tesla, Inc.: Target Price Consensus and Analysts Recommendations | TSLA

summary: 29-32 analysts covering TSLA. Consensus: Buy. Average price target: ~$405 (range $24.86-$600). Notable targets: Wedbush Dan Ives $600, Piper Sandler $500, UBS $352. Mean analyst projection $398.42. ARK Invest outlier at $4,600 (robotaxi/AI bull case).
